name: Pumpkin Curry
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Peeled, chopped pumpkin or other winter squash
2 cups Chopped unpeeled white potatoes (about 2 medium)
2 medium Carrots, peeled and diced (about 1 cup)
2 cups Shredded leafy greens (kale, spinach, escarole)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lentils and turmeric in the water for about 45 minutes over medium-low heat.
2. Drain, reserving 2-1/2 cups cooking liquid.
3. Heat oil in a large saucepan; add onion. Saute over medium heat for 4 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and garlic. Cook for 4 minutes more, stirring occasionally.
5. Add curry, cumin, salt, pepper, and cloves. Cook for 1 minute more, stirring frequently.
6. Stir in lentils, reserved cooking liquid, pumpkin, potatoes, tomato paste, and carrots. Cook over medium-low heat until vegetables are tender, approximately 35 to 40 minutes.
7. Stir in greens and apples and cook for 15 minutes more, stirring occasionally.
8. Serve hot.
